speaker: Official
en: Good morning.

speaker: Official
en: Community Learning Centre.

speaker: Official
en: What can I do for you?

speaker: Man
en: Oh, hello.

speaker: Man
en: I'm calling about the sports photography course you offer.

speaker: Man
en: I learned about it from an advert somewhere in the newspaper.

speaker: Official
en: OK, may I have your name, please?

speaker: Man
en: It's Chris Johnson.

speaker: Official
en: Thank you, Mr. Johnson.

speaker: Official
en: Is there anything in particular you would like to know?

speaker: Man
en: Yes.

speaker: Man
en: I'm eager to improve my photography skills.

speaker: Man
en: You know, my son has just joined the school football team this semester, and I want to keep a visual record of all these precious moments.

speaker: Man
en: But when I took shots, they were often too blurry.

speaker: Man
en: You see, I'm no expert.

speaker: Man
en: So I'd like to find out about the level of the course to see if it's suitable for me.

speaker: Official
en: Well, this course is intended for beginners only.

speaker: Official
en: But there will be an advanced course for experienced photographers next semester.

speaker: Man
en: That's good to know.

speaker: Man
en: I think this course works for me just fine.

speaker: Man
en: Do I have to go for an interview to register?

speaker: Official
en: There is no need to do that.

speaker: Official
en: We have plenty of vacancies right now.

speaker: Official
en: So if you plan to register, I can sign you up over the phone.

speaker: Man
en: Great.

speaker: Man
en: But before that, how much does it cost?

speaker: Official
en: It was 45 dollars last year for a single student.

speaker: Official
en: Luckily, this year we have more funding, so the price has gone down to 38 dollars.

speaker: Man
en: Oh, good.

speaker: Man
en: So when will the next course start?

speaker: Official
en: Let me check.

speaker: Official
en: Just a minute … It's Monday today, so there was a course that ended just last weekend.

speaker: Official
en: Then there is another one starting from April 17th.

speaker: Official
en: But if you miss this one, the next one is from May 1st.

speaker: Man
en: That's too late.

speaker: Man
en: I'll just register for the next course then.

speaker: Official
en: May I take your phone number?

speaker: Man
en: Sure.

speaker: Official
en: OK, I've made a note of that.

speaker: Official
en: When you come to take the first lesson, please bring two photos that you've taken.

speaker: Man
en: Is there any special requirement for the photos?

speaker: Official
en: Yes, you reminded me.

speaker: Official
en: The weather of the two shots should be different.

speaker: Man
en: Like one on a sunny day and another on a snowy day?

speaker: Official
en: Yes, exactly.

speaker: Man
en: So apart from the photos, do I need to prepare anything else for the course?

speaker: Official
en: Nothing more.

speaker: Man
en: Do you have a syllabus for the course?

speaker: Official
en: Sure, you can download it from our website.

speaker: Official
en: Just key in 'Community Learning Centre of Pinewood'.

speaker: Official
en: You can also come over to the centre and get a copy.

speaker: Man
en: I'll just download it online.

speaker: Man
en: But can you please introduce the course in detail?

speaker: Man
en: The course covers two days, right?

speaker: Official
en: Yes.

speaker: Official
en: On Saturday morning, the instructor will explain all the basics of amateur and professional sports photography and the differences between them, followed by instructions on the use of specific equipment for various sports, like long lenses and monopods for shooting football matches.

speaker: Man
en: That's exactly what I need to know.

speaker: Man
en: What about the rest of the course?

speaker: Official
en: On Saturday afternoon, there is normally a workshop on the technical side of things.

speaker: Official
en: For the photos that your classmates have brought, you'll have to work together to decide the best position to take these shots.

speaker: Man
en: Oh, that's interesting.

speaker: Official
en: On Sunday, there is a workshop taking place in a computer-equipped room where you'll learn to edit different shots.

speaker: Man
en: That sounds challenging.

speaker: Official
en: Indeed, it is.

speaker: Official
en: There is also a section on some tricks to sell them.

speaker: Man
en: To magazines and newspapers, you mean?

speaker: Official
en: Yes, mostly to the publishing industry.

speaker: Man
en: Um … I'd love to …
